title: The fuzzy logic of network connectivity in mouse visual thalamus
abstract: Serial EM reconstruction of the mouse lateral geniculate nucleus reveals that thalamic connectivity follows 'fuzzy logic' with retinal ganglion cell axons distributing synapses among multiple relay neurons, creating complex convergent/divergent networks.
notes: Morgan is first author. Key thalamic connectomics paper from Lichtman lab. Cross-listed with Lichtman.
